revision_summary: Three targeted fixes required: (1) rep_intent classification must be changed from 'reactive' to 'indeterminate / not assessable' — the only transcript line is the called party's outgoing voicemail greeting, not rep speech, so no rep intent can be read. (2) cherry_pick_moments[0] must remove the assertion that 'no message was left by the rep' as a default conclusion — the transcript's single-line capture is a Deepgram pipeline artifact (voicemail greeting captured before the beep), not proof the rep hung up. Reframe as a transcription-pipeline ambiguity requiring manager verification. (3) cherry_pick_moments[0] codex_reference must be corrected from bill_collection.alternative_paths (which covers live-call tech-friction pivots only) to either null or context.lead_types_and_bill_collection_rules with a note that no directly applicable schema section covers voicemail-touch protocol. cherry_pick_moments[2]'s citation of bill_collection.stewart_automated_bill_capture should be narrowed to the anti-pattern detection note only, with explicit acknowledgment that the capability spec's trigger assumes a live call occurred. No fabricated quotes, no missed moments, outcome dispute is valid — these are reasoning and schema-accuracy fixes only.
